binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Metasploit Framework 2
Version 2 of the Metasploit Framework.
No longer updated but still useful, particularly for shellcode.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use framework2 because ### framework2.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair framework2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `framework2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### framework2.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install framework2
Install with: sudo apt install framework2
